title: ocimum metallorum
intro: Ocimum metallorum, also known as the Metal Mint or Bitter Basil, is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) that exhibits distinctive metal-silver colored leaves. Traditionally, Ocimum metallorum is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ocimum metallorum are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Ocimum metallorum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
